event: Allegorical glorification of the government of Burgundy
symbols: trumpeting angels — fame and glory proclaimed
ascending figures amid clouds — apotheosis and divine favor
figure enthroned on clouds — sovereign authority sanctioned by heaven
description: A grand vertical ceiling composition filled with swirling figures in clouds. At the top, angels and winged figures hold a large laurel wreath, some blowing trumpets. In the center, allegorical female figures in flowing classical draperies of red, gold, blue, and green ascend or float among the clouds, holding swords, scepters, and other attributes of authority. At the bottom, a central seated female figure in blue and gold represents Burgundy, surrounded by cherubim and additional allegorical attendants. The composition spirals upward with dramatic foreshortening.

_meta.title: The Glorification of the government of Burgundy
